title: Generate JSON Data for a Social Network
constraints: The JSON output should be under 200 bytes
The JSON output should include at least 3 users
The JSON output should not contain any duplicate IDs

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated JSON data adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the generated JSON data syntactically valid?
Does the generated JSON data contain diverse content, including different user names, post contents, and comment contents?
